mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.subject_name, t0.subject_logo, t0.nature, t0.subject_type, t0.document_type, t0.document_number, t0.legal_representative, t0.contacts, t0.phone, t0.belong_province, t0.belong_city, t0.belong_district, t0.address, t0.remark, t0.is_deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT si.document_number from subject_info si inner join project_info pi on si.id = pi.debtor_id and pi.is_deleted = 0 WHERE si.is_deleted = 0 and si.document_number in
#{item}
